profile.name: Your Name
profile.title: Creative Full-Stack Engineer & AI Architect
profile.subtitle: Hi, I'm Your Name. A creative full-stack systems developer dedicating myself to designing highly responsive, elegant web applications and robust cloud backend integrations.

projects.title: Synapse Workspace
projects.desc: An AI-powered, real-time rich-text editor and collaborative workspace allowing instant synchronized document manipulation.
projects.details: Designed to optimize real-time concurrent changes without complex database engines, Synapse uses standard web technologies to achieve high visual consistency and accessible collaboration layouts. The backend handles connection syncing and logs documents directly to secured JSON endpoints.

projects.title: Zenith Finance Dashboard
projects.desc: High-fidelity web panel tracking decentralised blockchain portfolios with visual chart animations and real-time updates.
projects.details: A clean financial user experience built to withstand high density data feeds. Zenith utilizes smooth CSS Transitions and container queries to structure a robust web app that fits onto standard mobile screens without distorting visual panels.

projects.title: Vapor Telemetry Engine
projects.desc: Ultra-low latency data aggregator that parses thousands of microsecond server logs into visual system diagnostics.
projects.details: Vapor tracks web application metrics in real-time, delivering alert diagnostics directly to engineers. When threshold anomalies are detected, the Express backend fires off secure warning notifications to system administrators using Dotenv configurations.
